name: NumbersareFun — Ascension skill tree
description: Design tokens and UI rules for the Number 1 ascension map. Inspired by radial ARPG passive trees (strong per-branch color, clear node states, thick active paths vs muted locked paths). Use this file when editing style.css / index.html ascension markup.

reference.layoutInspiration: Three-branch radial passive tree: large readable nodes, branch-colored connectors, locked grey infrastructure, root at hub.
reference.asciiHandHub: Editor-style open hand with five digits + wrist '5' labels; source string is ASCENSION_TREE_EXPORT.HUB_HAND_ART in ascension-tree-data.js.

layout.coordinateSpace: SVG viewBox 0 0 100 100; node positions use the same percent space as the map layer.

hubCenter.note: Palm / Essence hub — mirror in ascension-tree-data.js as HUB_CENTER.

thumb.note: Top-right from hub; frees bottom-right dead space vs old 85,80.

hubHandArt.interpolation: Finalized nodes get x,y from layoutT (0–1 along hub→fingertip) plus lateral offset in finalizeAscensionNodes. Legacy hub→tip lerp in computeAscensionHandLayout applies only when a node lacks explicit x,y.

ideaABraid.pattern: Per finger: linear tierId 00–11; fork _a12/_b12 from _11; arms _a13–_a15 and _b13–_b15 (seed tiers 12–19); merge _m16 (two parents, 1 Essence, empty grants); tail _20–_24 from merge.
ideaABraid.layoutT: depth / BRAID_MAX_GRAPH_DEPTH (21) for each node depth along the longest path.
ideaABraid.lateral: FINGER_BRAID_LATERAL[finger] * sin(depth*0.62) on trunk; ±1.38*W on A/B arms; confluence at 0.

postLayoutRefine.separation: Same-finger pairwise repulsion, then cross-finger repulsion so index/middle (etc.) do not stack in the palm cluster. ASCENSION_ROUTE_SEEDS has no x,y — rendered positions come from NODES after finalize + refine.

planAlignment.handHub: Layout rays follow HUB_CENTER → FINGERTIP_TARGETS so branches align with HUB_HAND_ART, not a generic snowflake.
planAlignment.sankeyEdges: Cubic Bézier with perpendicular offset + bias toward HUB_CENTER midpoint — see ascensionSankeyEdgePath in index.html.
planAlignment.comboPulse: Production split across getComboParticipatingHandIndices (pattern hands), not all unlocked hands.

canvas.usage: Primary map viewport background (ARPG-style navy charcoal).

panelChrome.usage: Fallback / inner panels when not using canvas hex.

asciiHand.usage: Monospace hand art on the map; soft lavender on dark (editor reference).

nodeLocked.usage: Locked nodes and inactive feel — analogous to grey locked passives.

nodeOwned.usage: Allocated / owned — green success, like filled passive nodes.

edges.implementation: SVG cubic Bézier (C): control points blend chord tangent with offset toward/away from HUB_CENTER for merge-friendly flow.
edges.activeRule: Edge lit when parent owned (or root) and child owned or purchasable (prereqs met).

cursorAgentNotes: Prefer editing tokens in this JSON first, then mirror values into style.css for the classes listed in cssClassMap.
Branch colors must stay distinct for color-blind safety: rely on hue separation + legend labels, not color alone.
Hub art: ASCENSION_TREE_EXPORT.HUB_HAND_ART only on the ascension map; hands1[4] stays the compact clap glyph.
When changing fingertip positions, update both ascension-tree-data.js (HUB_CENTER, FINGERTIP_TARGETS) and this file layout.hubHandArt for Cursor parity.
When adding node states, follow locked → available → owned hierarchy from reference trees.
